headline: How The Jet2 (AIM:JET2) Investment Story Is Shifting With Recut Analyst Price Targets
summary: Jet2 is back in focus as analysts trim price targets, with some moving to £14.00 from £14.50 and £13.25 from £14.50, while fair value in one model holds steady at £16.61. These shifts line up with a research tone that balances recognition of solid execution with a more cautious view on how much upside to expect from here. Read on to see what these revised targets might mean for you and how to keep track of the evolving Jet2 story. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...
